summary: Base W11 (~20 mpw, §4.C) — Mon shape changed: athlete elected a 6-mi continuous T progression instead of the §4.C Mon easy + hill strides (8:13/mi avg, 4 mi at the 7:50–7:55 nudge, RPE RIR 2-3, 5th straight T quick of the nudge, Adj #125). That paid W11's one Base quality day, so Wed's 5×6 @ T drops and Wed becomes Z1 easy 30–35 min + 6–8 hill strides. Tue Hyp A done 6-30: fed, AM all-clean SI/Achilles/knee (Adj #132) — two Tue-slot bumps landed and one gate met: preacher 60→65 clean at 4×10 (splits slots — Tue 65, Sat still 60 at the harder 4×12 ask, Adj #128); decline crunch add-load gate met on 3×12 (add ~10 lb DB / 25 lb plate next Tue, Adj #131); rear-delt fly 130 running soft RIR 4/4 → bump-eligible 135 next Tue as an Adj #95-style intensity correction (Adj #130). Incline 145 hold — reps regressed sets 2-3 <24 h post Mon's T progression (predicted fatigue, not a §5 miss; set 1 RIR 2 = cleanest opener of the hold; TM 162 stands, Adj #126). DB lat 30 back half tightening — set 5 RIR 2 / set 6 = 14 to failure vs W10 Tue's 11 (Adj #127). Pushdown 22.5 repeats the 12/12/12/6 shape, hold; elbow very minor during WU + gone after 1st bench work set = under §10.A drop threshold but not fully symptom-free, 4-wk clock stays reset (Adj #129). Sat carry-forwards: lat pulldown 160 hold-until-clean (Adj #115); chest-supp row 75 rebuilding (Adj #116); Sat DB lat 30 bump-eligible if Adj #117 spread repeats; Sat preacher hold 60 (Adj #118/#128); pushdown 22.5 continues (Adj #119/#129); Sat seated calf 345 re-attempt gated on a clean-AM read on the lift day itself (Adj #120); Sat decline crunch gate still open (Adj #131). L Achilles settling trajectory holds — recheck AM Wed pre-strides (Adj #132). T pace nudge stays 7:50–7:55/mi; formal recalibration defers to next week's W12 5K-TT (§10).

days.note: Wed T dropped — paid by Mon's continuous T progression (Adj #125). This slot recovers the displaced Mon NM dose 48h post-T. Easy pace 9:45–10:45/mi, HR ≤155 (off-191 cap, anchor by pace), cadence 165–172 spm easy / 175–182 spm strides. Hold the ≤180 stride cadence cap (Adj #25/#62). Treadmill or road; recheck L Achilles AM pre-strides — first concentric calf/Achilles dose since W10 Mon (Adj #132/#106).

Base W11 Fri = easy + strides (§4.C); VO2max doesn't start until W13. Flat strides per §2.A — hill strides Mon-only (and this week Wed-only per the reshape).
